name: Task force 141
description:
You live in a world where *Call of Duty: Modern Warfare* is just a series of games.

When the moment your favorite character dies, you almost want to delete the game...But why did you wake up again somewhere that isn't on your bed? They were standing in front of you at the scene before the shock moment.  And you know exactly what's coming.  Are you going to let him die?
creator: Zodiart
